narrative.headline: What 2015 Volkswagen Beetle owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 99 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Air Bags (55% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.

issues.sample: TL* THE CONTACT OWNS A 2015 VOLKSWAGEN BEETLE. WHILE DRIVING 35 MPH, A FREIGHT TRUCK CRASHED INTO THE REAR PASSENGER SIDE OF THE CONTACT'S VEHICLE. THE AIR BAGS FAILED TO DEPLOY. A POLICE REPORT WAS NOT FILED. THE CONTACT FELT PAIN IN THE RIGHT ARM AND NECK, WHICH REQUIRED MEDICA
